title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Union Bank of India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Union Bank of India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Union Bank of India! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Chandigarh team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Union Bank of India:
Union Bank of India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Union Bank of India!
